title: Detoxify Poison
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{ForcePower |image= |name=Detoxify Poison |alternate= |alignment=Both sides of the Force,[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] usually the light side of the Force[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']] |area=Control[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] |purpose=Allowed an individual to detoxify poison from their body or eject it in a shorter time than usual |inventor= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Can you tell me how to get to Margess Base?''"
"''You planning on driving a landspeeder after sixteen mugs of Corellian whiskey?''"
"''Ahh…''(Waves hand.)'' I didn't drink sixteen mugs of Corellian whiskey.''"
"''It's a good thing you didn't drink sixteen mugs of Corellian whiskey. Just head west out over Autumna Planitia.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and a [[Unidentified bartender (Corellian whiskey)|bartender]]|}} '''Detoxify Poison''', or '''Cure Poison''',''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' was a [[Force power/Legends#Control|Control]]-based [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|power]] that allowed a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-user]] to detoxify [[Poison/Legends|poisons]] or eject them from their body in a much shorter amount of [[Time/Legends|time]] than would normally be possible. It could also be used to cleanse their body of [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]], allowing the individual to remain sober while consuming vast amounts of the drink. The power typically required extended concentration by the user and was limited to only removing the present and future effects of the poisons in one's system; past damage was not healed. During a meeting with [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] made use of this power to rid himself of the [[Karatos Plague]] that Fett had used to poison him.[[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 4|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 4]] [[Cade Skywalker]] used this power to resist the [[Ixetal cilona/Legends|Ixetal cilona]] administered by [[Darth Maladi]]. Maladi later commented that the power was similar to powers used by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].[[Legacy (2006) 15|''Legacy'' (2006) 15]] Indeed, Darth Sidious knew [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith Magic]] to defeat poison,[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] and had to use this power when he was poisoned with Aorth-6 during the Gentis Coup in the same year he became Emperor.[[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 2|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 2]] ==Appearances== *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} *[[Jedi vs. Sith 1|''Jedi vs.
